`table.xls` is copied from `github.com/millken/xls` v1.1.0, commit
`c5f78026ef7fc3e270301ec14176e1b635fdbcbd`, where it is distributed under
the Apache License 2.0. It is retained only as an interoperability test
fixture; no executable code from that module is linked as a dependency. The
license is reproduced at `internal/xls/LICENSE`.
